nasb.text: so that you do not act corruptly and make a graven image for yourselves in the form of any figure, the likeness of male or female,

esv.text: beware lest you act corruptly by making a carved image for yourselves, in the form of any figure, the likeness of male or female,

cnv.text: 恐怕你們敗壞自己，為自己製造偶像，製造任何神像的形象，無論是男像或是女像，

ccb.text: 所以不可堕落，去为自己制造任何形状的神像——男人、女人、
